elementName.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric power consumption

descriptions.ja: スイッチを切る/コンセントを抜き再操作
descriptions.en: Faults that can be recovered from by turn off the power or unplug and reoperate.

descriptions.ja: リセットボタンを押し再操作
descriptions.en: Faults that can be recovered from by pressing the reset button.

descriptions.ja: 異常現象／安全装置作動
descriptions.en: Abnormal event or the tripping of a safety device.
Fault in a component such as an actuator.
Fault in a control circuit board.

descriptions.ja: 温度計測値を(0.1℃単位で)示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured temperature value in units of 0.1C.
This property indicates the ON/OFF status.

descriptions.ja: 機器の節電動作を設定し、状態を取得する
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether the device is operating in power-saving mode.

descriptions.ja: 予約入/予約切を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the ON timer (time-based reservation function, relative time-based reservation function or both), and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 時刻予約、相対時間予約共に入
descriptions.en: Both the time- and relative time-based reservation functions are ON.
Relative time-based reservation function is ON.

descriptions.ja: タイマ値HH:MMを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the time for the time-based reservation function in the HH:MM format and to acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 秒の指定は無視される
note.en: Number of seconds is ignored.

propertyName.ja: ONタイマ相対時間設定値

descriptions.ja: タイマ値HH:MMを設定し、更新された時間を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the relative time for the relative time-based reservation function in the HH:MM format and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 予約入/予約切を設定し、設定内容を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the OFF timer (time-based reservation function, relative time-based reservation function or both), and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 時刻予約、相対時間予約共に入
descriptions.en: Both the time- and relative time-based reservation functions are ON.
Relative time-based reservation function is ON.

descriptions.ja: タイマ値HH:MMを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the time for the time-based reservation function in the HH:MM format and to acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 秒の指定は無視される
note.en: Number of seconds is ignored.

propertyName.ja: OFFタイマ相対時間設定値

descriptions.ja: タイマ値HH:MMを設定し、更新された時間を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the relative time for the relative time-based reservation function in the HH:MM format and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 風量レベルおよび風量自動状態を設定し、設定状態を取得する。風量レベルは8段階で指定
descriptions.en: Used to specify the air flow rate or use the function to automatically control the air flow rate, and to acquire the current setting. The air flow rate shall be selected from among the 8 predefined levels.
Automatic air flow rate control function used.

descriptions.ja: 風量レベルおよび風量自動状態を設定し、設定状態を取得する。風量レベルは8段階で指定
descriptions.en: Used to specify the air flow rate or use the function to automatically control the air flow rate, and to acquire the current setting. The air flow rate shall be selected from among the 8 predefined levels.
Automatic air flow rate control function used.

propertyName.en: Automatic control of air flow direction setting

descriptions.ja: 風向き上下左右のAUTO/非AUTOを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the automatic air flow direction control function, to specify the plane(s) (vertical and/or horizontal) in which the automatic air flow direction control function is to be used, and to acquire the current setting.

propertyName.en: Automatic swing of air flow setting

descriptions.ja: 風向スイングOFF/上下/左右/上下左右を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the automatic air flow swing function, to specify the plane(s) (vertical and/or horizontal) in which the automatic air flow swing function is to be used, and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 上下方向の風向きを5通りのパターンで設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the air flow direction in the vertical plane by selecting a pattern from among the 5 predefined patterns, and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 左右方向の風向きを31通りのパターンで設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the air flow direction(s) in the horizontal plane by selecting a pattern from among the 31 predefined patterns, and to acquire the current setting.
Left center, Center and Right center
Left, Left center, Right center and Right
Left center, Right center and Right
Left center, Center, Right center and Right
Left, Center, Right center and Right
Left, Left center and Right center
Left, Left center, Center and Right
Left, Left center, Center and Right center

descriptions.ja: 左・左中・中・右中・右
descriptions.en: Left, Left center, Center, Right center and Right

descriptions.ja: エアコンが特殊状態にあることを示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates if the air conditioner is in a 'special' state (i.e. the 'defrosting','preheating', or 'heat removal' state).

descriptions.ja: エアコンが非優先状態にあることを示す
descriptions.en: Used to indicate when the air conditioner is in a “non-priority” state.

descriptions.ja: 自動/冷房/暖房/除湿/送風/その他の運転モードを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the operation mode ('automatic','cooling','heating','dehumidification','air circulator' or 'other'), and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: AUTO/非AUTOを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the automatic temperature control function, and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 通常運転/急速/静音を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the type of operation ('normal','high-speed' or 'silent'), and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 温度設定値を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the temperature and to acquire the current setting.

propertyName.ja: 除湿モード時相対湿度設定値
propertyName.en: Set value of relative humidity in dehumidifying mode

descriptions.en: Used to set the relative humidity for the 'dehumidification' mode and to acquire the current setting.

propertyName.ja: 冷房モード時温度設定値
propertyName.en: Set temperature value in cooling mode

descriptions.ja: 冷房モード時設定温度値を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the temperature for the 'cooling' mode and to acquire the current setting.

propertyName.ja: 暖房モード時温度設定値
propertyName.en: Set temperature value in heating mode

descriptions.ja: 暖房モード時設定温度値を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the temperature for the 'heating' mode and to acquire the current setting.

propertyName.ja: 除湿モード時温度設定値
propertyName.en: Set temperature value in dehumidifying mode

descriptions.ja: 除湿モード時設定温度値を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the temperature for the 'dehumidification' mode and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.en: Rated power consumption in each operation mode of cooling/heating/dehumidifying/blast

propertyName.en: Measured value of room relative humidity

descriptions.en: Measured value of room relative humidity

propertyName.ja: ユーザリモコン温度設定値
propertyName.en: Set temperature value of user remote control

descriptions.en: Set temperature value of user remote control
This property indicates the measured cooled air temperature at the outlet.
This property indicates the measured outdoor air temperature.

descriptions.ja: エアコン動作中、動作モードにおける目標温度値に対する相対温度設定値を設定し、設定内容を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the relative temperature relative to the target temperature for an air conditioner operation mode, and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 換気の動作 (方向) を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the ventilation function, to specify the ventilation direction, and to acquire the current setting.
Ventilation function ON (outlet and intake direction)

descriptions.ja: 加湿のモード設定ON/OFFを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify whether or not to use the humidifier function, and to acquire the current setting.

descriptions.ja: 換気風量レベルを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the ventilation air flow rate by selecting a level from among the predefined levels, and to acquire the current setting.
Automatic control of ventilation air flow rate

descriptions.ja: 加湿量レベルを設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the degree of humidification to achieve by selecting a level from among the predefined levels, and to acquire the current setting.
Automatic control of the degree of humidification

descriptions.ja: 空気清浄機能を実現するために搭載されている方法をビットマップで示す

remark.ja: 状態変化時(状変時)のアナウンスは、プロパティ実装時には処理必須
remark.en: Announcement at status chenge is mondatory processig when the property is implenented.

note.ja: 下位1バイトは、スーパークラスのリセットボタンを押し再操作(0x02)固定。上位1バイトは、復帰可能な異常内容を小分類まで定義。0x45～0xFFはユーザ定義
note.en: Lower-order one byte: Restarting the device by performing a reset operation = 0x02. Higher-order one byte: The detailed fault classification. 0x45 to 0xFF are defined by user.

descriptions.en: This property specifies the operation time in seconds.

className.ja: 低圧スマート電力量メータ

descriptions.ja: 低圧スマート電力量メータをドメイン内で一意に識別するための番号
descriptions.en: This property indicates a number that allows low-voltage smart electric energy meters to be uniquely identified in the domain.

remark.ja: 日本国内における低圧スマート電力量メータは、本プロパティを搭載必須とする。日本国内では以下の値域である 1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
remark.en: Low-voltage smart electric energy meters in Japan must be equipped with this property.The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

note.ja: 日本国内では以下の値域である 1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
note.en: The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

propertyName.ja: 1分積算電力量計測値（正方向、逆方向計測値）
propertyName.en: One-minute measured cumulative amounts of electric energy measured (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 最新の1分毎の計測時刻における積算電力量を、計測年月日を4バイト、計測時刻を3バイト、積算電力量（正方向計測値）4バイト、積算電力量（逆方向計測値）4バイトで示す。・計測年月日　YYYY:MM:DD・計測時刻　hh:mm:ss・積算電力量(正方向)　10進表記で最大8桁・積算電力量(逆方向)　10進表記で最大8桁
descriptions.en: This property indicates the most recent cumulative amount of electric energy measured at 1-minute intervals held by the meter in the format of 4 bytes for date of measurement, 3 bytes for time of measurement, and 4 bytes for cumulative electric energy (normal direction), and 4 bytes for cumulative electric energy (reverse direction).・Date of measurement: YYYY:MM:DD・Measurement time: hh:mm:ss・Cumulative electric energy (normal direction): maximum 8 digits in decimal notation・Cumulative electric energy (reverse direction): maximum 8 digits in decimal notation

elementName.ja: 積算電力量計測値(正方向)
elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured (normal direction)

elementName.ja: 積算電力量計測値(逆方向)
elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured (reverse direction)

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値、履歴を実使用量に換算する係数を10進表記において6桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the coefficient for converting measured cumulative amount of electric energy and historical data to actual usage amount using a 6-digit decimal notation.

propertyName.en: Number of effective digits for cumulative amounts of electric energy

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値の有効桁数を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the number of effective digits for measured cumulative amounts of electric energy.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値 (正方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy (normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量を10進表記において、最大8桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured cumulative amount of electric energy using an 8-digit decimal notation number.

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量単位 (正方向、逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Unit for cumulative amounts of electric energy (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量計測値、履歴の単位(乗率)を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the unit (multiplying factor) used for the measured cumulative amount of electric energy and the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴1 (正方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy 1 (normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日1と該当収集日の24時間48コマ分(0時0分～23時30分)の正方向の定時積算電力量計測値の履歴データを時系列順に上位バイトからプロパティ値として示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 1 and the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (normal direction), which consists of 48 items of half-hourly data for the preceding 24 hours (00:00 to 23:30) of the day by time series from the highest-order byte.

elementName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE5
remark.en: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE5

note.ja: Queryは履歴収集日 (省略時は0)。電力量はEPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is Day for collection (default value is 0). Electric power is multipled by EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値 (逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算電力量を10進表記において、最大8桁で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured cumulative amounts of electric energy using an 8-digit decimal notation number.

remark.ja: 脚注参照
remark.en: Refer to footnote

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴1 (逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy 1 (reverse direction)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日1と該当収集日の24時間48コマ分(0時0分～23時30分)の逆方向の定時積算電力量計測値の履歴データを時系列順に上位バイトからプロパティ値として示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 1 and the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (reverse direction), which consists of 48 items of half-hourly data for the preceding 24 hours (00:00 to 23:30) of the day by time series from the highest-order byte.

elementName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: 脚注参照, Atomic operation with EPC=0xE5
remark.en: Refer to footnote, Atomic operation with EPC=0xE5

note.ja: Queryは履歴収集日 (省略時は0)。電力量はEPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is Day for collection (default value is 0). Electric power is multipled by EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 1

descriptions.ja: 30分毎の計測値履歴データを収集する日を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy (which consists of 48 items of half-hourly data for the preceding 24 hours) is to be retrieved.

remark.ja: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE2 and 0xE4
remark.en: Atomic operation with EPC=0xE2 and 0xE4

descriptions.ja: 電力実効値の瞬時値を1W単位で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous electric power in 1W unit.

descriptions.ja: 実効電流値の瞬時値を0.1A単位でR相T相を並べて示す単相2線式の場合は、T相に0x7FFEをセット
descriptions.en: This property indicates the measured effective instantaneous R and T phase currents in 0.1A unit.In the case of a single-phase, two-wire system, 0x7FFE shall be used for the T phase.

propertyName.ja: 定時積算電力量計測値 (正方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured at fixed time (normal direction)

descriptions.ja: 最新の30分毎の計測時刻における積算電力量(正方向計測値)を、計測年月日を4バイト、計測時刻を3バイト、積算電力量(正方向計測値)4バイトで示す・計測年月日 YYYY:MM:DD・計測時刻 hh:mm:ss・積算電力量 10進表記で最大8桁
descriptions.en: This property indicates the most recent cumulative amount of electric energy (normal direction) measured at 30-minute intervals held by the meter in the format of 4 bytes for date of measurement, 3 bytes for time of measurement, and 4 bytes for cumulative electric energy (normal direction).date of measurement YYYY:MM:DDtime of measurement hh:mm:sscumulative electric energy: an 8-digit decimal notation number

elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.ja: 定時積算電力量計測値 (逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured at fixed time (reverse direction)

descriptions.ja: 最新の30分毎の計測時刻における積算電力量(逆方向計測値)を、計測年月日を4バイト、計測時刻を3バイト、積算電力量(逆方向計測値)4バイトで示す・計測年月日 YYYY:MM:DD・計測時刻 hh:mm:ss・積算電力量10進表記で最大8桁
descriptions.en: This property indicates the most recent cumulative amount of electric energy (reverse direction) measured at 30-minute intervals held by the meter in the format of 4 bytes for date of measurement, 3 bytes for time of measurement, and 4 bytes for cumulative electric energy (reverse direction).date of measurement YYYY:MM:DDtime of measurement hh:mm:sscumulative electric energy: an 8-digit decimal notation number

elementName.en: Cumulative amounts of electric energy measured

remark.ja: 脚注参照
remark.en: Refer to footnote

note.ja: EPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴2 (正方向、逆方向計測値)
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy 2 (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日時、収集コマ数及び積算電力量(最大8桁)の計測結果履歴を、正・逆30分毎のデータで過去最大6時間分示す・積算履歴収集日時YYYY:MM:DD:hh:mm・収集コマ数・積算電力量10進表記において最大8桁、最大6時間分
descriptions.en: This property indicates the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy every 30 minutes in the normal and reverse directions within the past six hours in the form of date and time for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved, the number of collection segments, and cumulative amount of electric energy (8 digits max).'date and time for which the historical data is to be retrieved YYYY:MM:DD:hh:mm' number of collection segments'cumulative amounts of electric energyDecimal notation up to 8 digits (6 hours max)

elementName.en: Date and time for which the historical data is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: Atomic operation with EPC=0xED。電力量は最大12セット。分のデータは0x00 (0分)または0x1E (30分)。初期値：0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01FFFFFFFEFFFFFFFE
remark.en: Atomic operation with EPC=0xED, energy is max. 12 sets of data. Data for minutes should be either 0x00 (0 minute) or 0x1E (30 minutes). Default value: 0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01FFFFFFFEFFFFFFFE

note.ja: Queryは日時と収集コマ数。秒の値は0、分の値は0または30。電力量はEPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is data&time and Number of collection segments. Value of seconds is 0 and value of minutes is 0 or 30. Electric energy is multipled by EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 2

descriptions.ja: 30分毎の計測値履歴データを収集する日時(30分単位)、及び30分毎の計測値履歴データを1コマとし、収集するコマ数を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the date and time of historical data of measurements (every 30 minutes) and the number of segments where measurement historical data is collected every 30 minutes.

elementName.en: Date and time for which the historical data is to be retrieved

remark.ja: 分のデータは0x00 (0分)または0x1E (30分)。0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01：初期値
remark.en: Data for minutes should be either 0x00 (0 minute) or 0x1E (30 minutes). 0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01: Default value

propertyName.ja: 積算電力量計測値履歴3（正方向、逆方向計測値）
propertyName.en: Historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy 3 (normal and reverse directions)

descriptions.ja: 積算履歴収集日時、収集コマ数及び積算電力量(最大8桁)の計測結果履歴を、正・逆1分毎のデータで過去最大10分間を示す。・積算履歴収集日時 YYYY:MM:DD:hh:mm・収集コマ数・積算電力量 10進表記において最大8桁、最大10分間
descriptions.en: This property indicates the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy every 1 minutes in the normal and reverse directions within the past ten minutes in the form of date and time for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved, the number of collection segments, and cumulative amount of electric energy (8 digits max). ・Date and time for which the historical data is to be retrieved YYYY:MM:DD:hh:mm ・number of collection segments ・cumulative amounts of electric energy Maximum 8 digits in decimal notation (10 minutes max)

elementName.en: Date and time for which the historical data is to be retrieved
Measured cumulative amounts of electric energy

remark.ja: Atomic operation with EPC=0xEF。初期値：0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01FFFFFFFEFFFFFFFE
remark.en: Atomic operation with EPC=0xEF. Default value: 0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01FFFFFFFEFFFFFFFE

note.ja: Queryは日時と収集コマ数。秒の値は0。電力量はEPC=0xD3, 0xE1の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is data&time and Number of collection segments. Value of seconds is 0. Electric energy is multipled by EPC=0xD3 and 0xE1.

propertyName.en: Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved 3

descriptions.ja: 1分毎の計測値履歴データを収集する日時(1分単位)、及び1分毎の計測値履歴データを1コマとし、収集するコマ数を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the date and time of historical data of measurements (every 1 minute) and the number of segments where measurement historical data measured at 1-minute intervals is collected.

elementName.en: Date and time for which the historical data is to be retrieved

remark.ja: 0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01：初期値
remark.en: 0xFFFFFFFFFFFF01: Default value

descriptions.en: This property indicates the ON/OFF status.

descriptions.ja: 照明の明るさを%で示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates light level in %.
This property indicates the color setting.
This property indicates the color setting.
This property indicates the color setting.

propertyName.ja: 照明の明るさ段数設定

descriptions.ja: 照明の明るさを段数で設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the light level in terms of steps and acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 0x01～設定可能照明の明るさ最大値(暗～明)
note.en: From 0x01 to the maximum specifiable light level value (dark to bright)

descriptions.ja: 光色レベルを段数で設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to specify the light color in terms of steps and acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 0x01～設定可能光色レベル最大値(電球色～白色)
note.en: From 0x01 to the maximum specifiable light color value (incandescent lamp color to white)

propertyName.ja: 設定可能レベル最大値

descriptions.ja: 通常灯モード時の照明の明るさ及び光色設定可能レベル最大値を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to acquire the maximum specifiable light level value and the maximum specifiable light color value of main lighting.

descriptions.ja: 機能を搭載していない場合
descriptions.en: When the function is not implemented.

descriptions.ja: 機能を搭載していない場合
descriptions.en: When the function is not implemented.

propertyName.ja: 常夜灯設定可能レベル最大値
propertyName.en: Maximum value of settable level for night lighting

descriptions.ja: 常夜灯モード時の照明の明るさ及び光色設定可能レベル最大値を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to acquire the maximum values of light level and light color settable levels for night lighting.

descriptions.ja: 機能を搭載していない場合
descriptions.en: When the function is not implemented

descriptions.ja: 機能を搭載していない場合
descriptions.en: When the function is not implemented.

descriptions.ja: 自動/通常灯/常夜灯/カラー灯

propertyName.ja: 通常灯モード時照明の明るさ設定
propertyName.en: Light level setting for main lighting

descriptions.ja: 通常灯モード時の照明の明るさを%で示す
descriptions.en: Indicates the light level of main lighting in %.

propertyName.ja: 通常灯モード時照明の明るさ段数設定
propertyName.en: Light level step setting for main lighting

descriptions.ja: 通常灯モード時照明の明るさを段数で設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the light level by the number of steps for main lighting and to acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 0x01～設定可能照明の明るさ最大値(暗～明)
note.en: Light level step setting for night lighting (dark to bright)

propertyName.ja: 常夜灯モード時照明の明るさ設定
propertyName.en: Light level setting for night lighting

descriptions.ja: 常夜灯モード時の照明の明るさを%で示す
descriptions.en: Indicates the light level of night lighting in %.

propertyName.ja: 常夜灯モード時照明の明るさ段数設定
propertyName.en: Light level step setting for night lighting

descriptions.ja: 常夜灯モード時照明の明るさを段数で設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the light level by the number of steps for night lighting and to acquire the current setting status.

note.ja: 0x01～設定可能照明の明るさ最大値(暗～明)
note.en: 0x01 to the maximum value of settable light level (dark to bright)

propertyName.ja: 通常灯モード時光色設定
propertyName.en: Light color setting for main lighting

descriptions.ja: 通常灯モード時光色を設定する
descriptions.en: Used to set the light color for main lighting.

propertyName.ja: 通常灯モード時光色レベル段数設定
propertyName.en: Light color level step setting for main lighting

descriptions.ja: 通常灯モード時光色レベルを段数で設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the light color level by the number of steps for main lighting and to acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 0x01～設定可能光色レベル最大値(電球色～白色)
note.en: 0x01 to the maximum value of settable light color level (incandescent lamp color to white)

propertyName.ja: 常夜灯モード時光色設定
propertyName.en: Light color setting for night lighting

descriptions.ja: 常夜灯モード時光色を設定する
descriptions.en: Used to set the light color for night lighting.

propertyName.ja: 常夜灯モード時光色レベル段数設定
propertyName.en: Light color level step setting for night lighting

descriptions.ja: 常夜灯モード時光色レベルを段数で設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the light color level by the number of steps for night lighting and to acquire the current setting.

note.ja: 0x01～設定可能光色レベル最大値(電球色～白色)
note.en: 0x01 to the maximum value of settable light color level (incandescent lamp color to white)

propertyName.ja: 自動モード時点灯モード状態
propertyName.en: Lighting mode status in auto mode

descriptions.ja: 自動モード時の点灯モード状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to acquire the current lighting mode in auto mode.

propertyName.ja: カラー灯モード時RGB設定

descriptions.ja: カラー灯モード時のRGB値を設定し、設定状態を取得する
descriptions.en: Used to set the RGB value for color lighting and to acquire the current setting.

note.en: This property utilizes both EPC: 0x97 and 0x98.

note.en: EDT: [{0x41:(time:ON,relative time:ON)}, {0x42:(time:OFF,relative time:OFF)}, {0x43:(time:ON,relative time:OFF)}, {0x44:(time:OFF,relative time:ON)}]

note.en: EDT: [{0x41:(time:ON,relative time:ON)}, {0x42:(time:OFF,relative time:OFF)}, {0x43:(time:ON,relative time:OFF)}, {0x44:(time:OFF,relative time:ON)}]

descriptions.ja: ノードの動作状態を示す
通信ミドルウェアが適用しているECHONET LiteのVersion、および通信ミドルウェアがサポートする電文タイプを示す
descriptions.en: Indicates ECHONET Lite version used by communication middleware and message types supported by communication middleware.

note.ja: 1バイト目:メジャーバージョン。2バイト目:マイナーバージョン。3バイト目:電文形式をbitmapで示す。4バイト目:0x00
note.en: 1st byte: major version, 2nd byte: minor version, 3rd data: bitmap of data format, 4th byte: 0x00

descriptions.ja: オブジェクトを、ドメイン内で一意に識別するための番号
descriptions.en: Number to identify the node implementing the device object in the domain.

note.ja: 1バイト目は0xFE。2~4バイト目はメーカコード。残りは機器毎のユニーク値
note.en: 1st data is 0xFE. 2nd to 4th data is manufacture code. The rest should be unique to each device.

descriptions.ja: 何らかの異常の発生状況を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether a fault has occurred or not.

descriptions.ja: 3バイトの事業場コードで指定

descriptions.en: Identifies the product using ASCII code.
This property indicates the production number using ASCII code.

propertyName.ja: 状変アナウンスプロパティマップ

descriptions.ja: プロパティ数が15以下の場合はEPCを列挙、16以上の場合はビットマップで記述する。
descriptions.en: Enumuration of EPC in case of the count is less than 16, or bitmap in case of the count is more than 15

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. Refer Annex 1 of the Appendix.

descriptions.ja: プロパティ数が15以下の場合はEPCを列挙、16以上の場合はビットマップで記述する。
descriptions.en: Enumuration of EPC in case of the count is less than 16, or bitmap in case of the count is more than 15

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. Refer Annex 1 of the Appendix.

descriptions.ja: プロパティ数が15以下の場合はEPCを列挙、16以上の場合はビットマップで記述する。
descriptions.en: Enumuration of EPC in case of the count is less than 16, or bitmap in case of the count is more than 15

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. Refer Annex 1 of the Appendix.

descriptions.ja: ドメイン内で、各ノードを一意に識別するための2バイトデータ
descriptions.en: 2 byte data to identify each node in a domain

note.en: Refer ECHONET Lite SPECIFICATION Part 2 Chapter 6.11.1.

descriptions.ja: 自ノードで保持するクラス総数

descriptions.en: Instance list when self-node instance configuration is changed.

note.ja: インスタンスリストは機器オブジェクトの3バイトのEOJを列挙する
note.en: Instance list is an array of EOJ. (3 bytes)

propertyName.ja: 自ノードインスタンスリストS

note.ja: インスタンスリストは3バイトのEOJを列挙する
note.en: Instance list is an array of EOJ. (3 bytes)

descriptions.ja: 自ノード内クラスリスト

note.ja: ノードプロファイルクラスは除く
note.en: Excluding node profile class

descriptions.en: This property indicates the ON/OFF status.
This property indicates the installation location

remark.ja: bitmap(例 0x00: 未設定(初期値), 0x08: リビング)
remark.en: bitmap (eg. 0x00: undefined (initial data), 0x08: living)

descriptions.en: This property indicates the installation location

remark.ja: 1byte bitmap(例 0x00: 未設定(初期値), 0x08: リビング)または0x01で始まる17 byte data
remark.en: 1byte bitmap (eg. 0x00: undefined (initial data), 0x08: living) or 17 bytes data starting from 0x01

descriptions.ja: 対応するAPPENDIXのリリース番号を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the release number of the corresponding Appendix.

remark.ja: 1,2バイト目は0x00。3バイト目は機器オブジェクトのリリースバージョンをASCIIで表す。リリース Aのみ小文字で0x61, B以降は大文字で0x42, 0x43...。4バイト目は、そのリリースバージョンのリビジョン番ををASCIIで表す(0x00～0xFF)。
remark.en: 1st and 2nd data is 0x00. 3rd data is the release version of Device Object in ASCII. Only release A utilize lower case letter 0x61, Release B and later utilize upper case letter such as 0x42, 0x43... 4th data is the revision number of the release version in ASCII (0x00 - 0xFF).

descriptions.ja: オブジェクトを固有に識別する番号
descriptions.en: A number that allows each object to be uniquely identified.

remark.ja: 1バイト目は0xFE。2～4バイト目はメーカコード。残りは機器毎のユニーク値
remark.en: 1st data is 0xFE. 2nd to 4th data is manufacture code. The rest should be unique to each device.

descriptions.ja: オブジェクトを固有に識別する番号
descriptions.en: A number that allows each object to be uniquely identified.

remark.ja: 1バイト目は0xFE。2～4バイト目はメーカコード。残りは機器毎のユニーク値
remark.en: 1st data is 0xFE. 2nd to 4th data is manufacture code. The rest should be unique to each device.

descriptions.ja: 機器の瞬時消費電力をWで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the instantaneous power consumption of the device in watts.

propertyName.ja: 積算消費電力量計測値

descriptions.ja: 機器の積算消費電力量を0.001kWhで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the cumulative electric energy consumption of the device in increments of 0.001kWh.

descriptions.ja: 各メーカ独自の異常コードを示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the manufacturer-defined fault code.

descriptions.ja: 電流制限の設定値を示す(0～100%)
descriptions.en: This property indicates the current limit setting (0 to 100%).

descriptions.ja: 何らかの異常(センサトラブル等)の発生状況を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether a fault (e.g. a sensor trouble) has occurred or not.

descriptions.ja: 3バイトの事業場コードで指定

descriptions.en: Identifies the product using ASCII code.
This property indicates the production number using ASCII code.

descriptions.ja: 機器の節電動作状態を示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether the device is operating in power-saving mode.

descriptions.ja: 公衆回線を介した操作か否かを示す。(0x41、0x42)通信回線の状態が正常か否かを示す。(0x61、0x62)
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether remote control is through a public network or not. (0x41, 0x42)This property indicates whether the status of the communication line is normal or not. (0x61, 0x62)

descriptions.ja: 公衆回線を介した操作か否かを示す。(0x41、0x42)通信回線の状態が正常か否かを示す。(0x61、0x62)
descriptions.en: This property indicates whether remote control is through a public network or not. (0x41, 0x42)This property indicates whether the status of the communication line is normal or not. (0x61, 0x62)

descriptions.ja: 通信回線正常(公衆回線経由の操作不可)
descriptions.en: Communication line is normal. (operation through a public network is not possible.)

descriptions.ja: 通信回線正常(公衆回線経由の操作可能)
descriptions.en: Communication line is normal. (operation through a public network is possible.)

descriptions.ja: 電力制限の設定値をWで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the power limit setting in watts.

descriptions.ja: 現在までの運転時間の積算値を単位1バイト、時間4バイトで示す
descriptions.en: This property indicates the cumulative number of days, hours, minutes or seconds for which the device has operated, using 1 byte for the unit and 4 bytes for the time.

propertyName.ja: 状変アナウンスプロパティマップ

descriptions.ja: プロパティ数が15以下の場合はEPCを列挙、16以上の場合はビットマップで記述する。
descriptions.en: Enumuration of EPC in case of the count is less than 16, or bitmap in case of the count is more than 15

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. See Annex 1 of the Appendix.

descriptions.ja: プロパティ数が15以下の場合はEPCを列挙、16以上の場合はビットマップで記述する。
descriptions.en: Enumuration of EPC in case of the count is less than 16, or bitmap in case of the count is more than 15

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. See Annex 1 of the Appendix.

descriptions.ja: プロパティ数が15以下の場合はEPCを列挙、16以上の場合はビットマップで記述する。
descriptions.en: Enumuration of EPC in case of the count is less than 16, or bitmap in case of the count is more than 15

note.ja: 1バイト目は個数。プロパティ数が15個以下の場合は列挙、16個以上の場合はbitmap。Appendixの付録1 参照
note.en: 1st byte is count of property. If the count is less than 16, enumerate. Else, bitmap. See Annex 1 of the Appendix.

note.ja: Machine Readable Appendix V1.3.0
note.en: Machine Readable Appendix V1.3.0
